title: BJSDatasetRow
description: A single row returned by a BJS Socrata-backed dataset (NCVS or NIBRS National Estimates). Field names and types vary per dataset; common metadata fields are described below.

year.description: Survey or reporting year associated with the row.

estimate.description: Numeric estimate as published by BJS, returned as a string.

standard_error.description: Standard error of the estimate where applicable.

category.description: Category, demographic, or offense grouping for the estimate.
